title: smithanthe rhodochelia
intro: Smithanthe rhodochelia is a plant species, more commonly known as the 'Milkflower' or 'Mountain Orchid', which belongs to the Bignoniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. These compounds have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to various health benefits such as wound healing, anti-cancer properties, and protection against cardiovascular diseases. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
